audience_policies.source_phrase: THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS The discount code can be used to purchase up to 4 tickets at 50% off admission. Please check https://www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/ for 2025 ferry schedule and the most updated information. Tickets must be purchased online and are printable.
